sourcePolicy: Public-safe generalized heuristic. Contains no extracted assets, paths, names, proprietary values, or private reports.

cards.title: Premium Xianxia Art Direction Checklist
cards.summary: A premium xianxia style pack should balance restrained elegance, readable systems, layered rarity expression, and milestone-focused spectacle.
designRules: Use restrained base palettes and reserve high-intensity glow for milestones.
Define separate rules for character silhouette, artifact identity, UI panels, and reward effects.
Use original names and motifs created for the project; do not derive names from private references.
Create checklist-driven briefs before producing art or motion assets.
cards.mgaiUsage: Generate ArtDirectionChecklist and StyleTokenPack for xianxia idle or RPG projects.
